name: Alphabet
confidenceReason: Trading at 12.3% discount to DCF intrinsic value ($340 vs $298). Cash machine. But PEG 2.3x signals slowing growth, too low-beta for 2x strategy.
bullCase: An unstoppable cash-generating monopoly trading at a severe mathematical discount to its intrinsic cash-flow generation capability.
bearCase: The PEG ratio of 2.3x indicates slowing growth expectations. It acts as a low-beta gravity well, dragging down the geometric compounding rate of a leveraged basket.
